name: STING Tools
description: STING Tools ZeroTouch node library. 48+ nodes across Tag, Placement, Routing, Validation, MEP, Fabrication, BOQ, Sheets, Export, Standards categories. Every node delegates to the STING dock-panel command pipeline so the graph sees identical behaviour to manual button clicks.
contents: Dynamo ZeroTouch library — StingTools.Dynamo.dll. Requires StingTools.dll loaded in Revit (installed as a Revit add-in). Samples folder contains 5 representative .dyn workflow graphs.
